import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Unit
  let line1 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let line2 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let t = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
  when Some(n)
    n
  when None
    0
  end

  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut current = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n_len = string.len(line1)

  while i <= n_len
    let b = if i < n_len
      match string.byte_at(line1, i)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        32
      end
    else
      32
    end

    let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13

    if is_ws
      if not string.is_empty(current)
        match string.parse_int(current)
        when Some(v)
          if v > t
            nums = list.push(nums, v)
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
        current = ""
      end
    else
      current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end

    i = i + 1
  end

  mut out = ""
  mut j = 0
  let m = list.len(nums)
  while j < m
    let v = match list.get(nums, j)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if j == 0
      out = "#{v}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
    j = j + 1
  end

  println(out)
end
